source_pr.title: session: fix data race in the TestInitMetaTable
source_pr.body:

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: session: fix data race in the TestInitMetaTable
failure_signature: session: fix data race in the TestInitMetaTable
root_cause_explanation: The test accessed table metadata objects that could be shared/mutated concurrently, triggering a Go data race when comparing metadata from different schemas. This PR stabilizes the test by cloning the table metadata (`Meta().Clone()`) before assertions so the test works on an isolated snapshot rather than a potentially shared mutable object.
fix_pattern: session: fix data race in the TestInitMetaTable
